steps.title: Locate what happened to the aria
steps.content: The passage directly states: “They omitted parts, such as the aria 'I Got Plenty of Nuthin'.” This is the decisive fact. The aria was omitted from Davis and Evans's adaptation.

steps.title: Match the fact to the choices
steps.content: If the aria was omitted from the 1958 adaptation, it must exist in Gershwin's original 1935 opera but not in the Davis-Evans version. Choice A states exactly this — the aria appears in the original opera but not in the adaptation. The other three either contradict the omission by claiming the aria appears in the adaptation, make claims unsupported by the text, or suggest something that conflicts with the omission. That matches choice A — A is correct.
